trivia_bullets.text: Memorial to Glory is the white member of the five-card Memorial cycle from Dominaria (April 27, 2018). Thematically it reads as an homage to Benalia — Dominaria's great human-military nation, destroyed in the Phyrexian Invasion and rebuilt as New Benalia by the set's era. The ability (create two 1/1 Soldier tokens) mirrors white's martial identity and the soldier-as-institution Benalia embodies.
sources: WebSearch: Dominaria lore, New Benalia / Phyrexian Invasion context

trivia_bullets.text: Activation cost {3}{W} to produce two 1/1 Soldier tokens is the second-cheapest Memorial activation in the cycle (after Folly at {2}{B}). EDHREC rank 6583, appearing in approximately 20,052 Commander decks per the EDHREC search result — middle of the five Memorials by popularity, primarily played in Soldier-tribal and token-generation Commander shells.

Illustrated by James Paick, who also painted Memorial to Genius (no. 243) — the only artist to illustrate two of the five Memorials. Reprinted in Commander 2019 (C19); no further reprints per Scryfall print record.

related_cards.note: blue cycle member; same artist (James Paick); BBL holds

related_cards.name: History of Benalia
